title: Himalaiella abnormis

The species is further categorized under the phylum Ascomycota and the kingdom Fungi. The classification of Himalaiella abnormis is based on its morphological and molecular characteristics. This classification helps in understanding the evolutionary relationships and diversity of the species within the fungal kingdom.

The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its potential health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help alleviate conditions such as arthritis and reduce oxidative stress in the body.
